title: Simple better swords
description: I was tired of the vanilla Minecraft swords so I decided to make a small edit to the tip of the swords to make them more "sharp" so I hope you really like this resource pack.
body:
**┃This texture changes the following textures**

• Wood sword
• Stone sword
• Gold sword
• Iron sword
• Diamond sword
• Netherite sword

**┃Versions - [Java]**

• 1.21.5
• 1.16.5 · 1.16.2
• 1.12.2 · 1.11

It's a simple edit to improve something that hasn't changed in years. I know it's not the best edit in the world, but compared to the original it's much better.
